actual_output:
I currently have no active application pipeline data loaded. To get started, please provide your target role, preferred location, salary requirements, and any specific industries or companies you are targeting.

Once you provide those parameters, I will scan the boards, filter for qualified listings, and generate your initial pipeline report. What are we looking for today?
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified that it had no data to report and provided a clear path forward for the user to initiate the pipeline process.
